pages.text: Appears in:$(li)Kamen Rider Den-O (2007, TV show)$(br2)Used to access Den-O's $(l:den_o/riders/den_o#climax)Climax Form$(/l), $(l:den_o/riders/den_o#climax_punch)Climax Form (Punch Mode)$(/l), $(l:den_o/riders/den_o#climax_kick)Climax Form (Kick Mode)$(/l), and $(l:den_o/riders/den_o#super_climax)Super Climax Form$(/l)
